name: The Gem of Chant
overview:
A cursed ruby binds two young men from different worlds — one a gem craftsman, the other a mysterious spirit of Chanthaburi.

Their fates intertwine through love, loss, and the mystical power of the “Ruby of Chantra.”

The Gem of Chant is an award-winning Thai BL fantasy pilot blending romance, folklore, and soft power to showcase the beauty of Chanthaburi.

trailers.title: The Gem of Chant – Thai BL Fantasy Pilot | A Love Cursed by a Ruby 💎
